description.line1: Looks like nothing exists at this address.
description.line2: The page may have been renamed or never existed.

actions.orChoose: Or choose one of the sections below:

currentPrediction.title: Current prediction
currentPrediction.description: Check model signals for the nearest trading day.

backtestSummary.title: Backtest summary
backtestSummary.description: See how the strategy behaved on historical data.

about.title: About the project
about.description: Short overview of the system idea, architecture, and capabilities.

pageError.title: This part of the page failed to load
pageError.description: You can retry this section. If the error persists, check settings or open another route; the rest of the application remains available.
pageError.localizedTitle: Localized page section failed to load
pageError.localizedDescriptionDefault: The error is limited to the main content area. The active localization resource is missing or invalid, while the navbar, sidebar, and rest of the layout remain available.
pageError.localizedDescriptionSwitchToRussian: The error is limited to the main content area. If the issue affects only the English copy, switch to the Russian version and continue using the website.
pageError.localizedDescriptionSwitchToEnglish: The error is limited to the main content area. If the issue affects only the Russian copy, switch to the English version and continue using the website.

sectionErrorBoundary.title: Section render error
sectionErrorBoundary.description: This block is temporarily unavailable due to a client-side error. The rest of the page remains available.

localizedContentBoundary.title: Localized block failed to load
localizedContentBoundary.descriptionDefault: The error is limited to this block. The active localization resource is missing or violates the expected contract, while the rest of the page remains available.
localizedContentBoundary.descriptionSwitchToRussian: The error is limited to this block. If the issue affects only the English copy, switch to the Russian version and continue reading the page.
localizedContentBoundary.descriptionSwitchToEnglish: The error is limited to this block. If the issue affects only the Russian copy, switch to the English version and continue reading the page.
